description: CompositionBlack jacket made of 100% polyester, has a high collar neck with velcro, long raglan sleeves with eslasticated cuffs, adidas patented 3-Stripes on the shoulders and halfway down on the sleeves, full front zipper closure with velcro, two insert pockets, hood with press buttons, mesh lining on the inside of the hood and jacket, and brand name embroidered on the left chestFittingRegularWash careWash dark colours separately at less than 30 degreesDo not soak, bleach, tumble dry or dry cleanDry in shadeCool iron; do not iron on print/trims/logosGear up and upgrade your winter wardrobe with this jacket from adidas. Created from polyester fabric, this jacket is sure to keep you warm and comfy, while you enjoy that hot street food on misty evenings. Layer it over a T-shirt and jeans, add on sports shoes and hit the streets this winter in style.Model statistics The model wears size M in jacketsHeight: 6', Shoulders: 18"
